examples: Only in the Pied Piper of Hamelin are the children taken away, lost forever.
In Germany, we went to the village of Hamelin, where the tale of the Pied Piper takes place.
Besides, we can take some pied magpies home for BBQ.
He is also looking forward to seeing pied flycatchers nesting, red kites, and a heronry.
At his Montreal restaurant Au Pied de Cochon, savory tarts are regularly pulled from the oven.
